product_focus: USB-C / USB-A OTG Adapter 6 Stück Set
goal: WOW marketplace listing system: mobile-first, policy-safe, search-visible, competitor-aware, conversion-focused
current_priority: Improve existing 6pc listing before scaling/new variants

competitor_intelligence_agent: collect top eBay/Amazon competitor titles, prices, sold count, photos, videos, item specifics, delivery, returns
separate copyable ideas from policy-risk ideas
photo_director_agent_v3: main photo: clean product-only, white/light background, no text, 6 pieces visible
photo order: main, connector closeup, 6pc set, use case, scale, colors, compatibility, package
block text-heavy main images and unclear connector direction
mobile_buyer_critic: 3-second test: buyer must understand what it is, how many pieces, connector direction, compatibility, why buy
criticize from phone view, not desktop view
seo_title_agent: build title under eBay search intent
must include: 6x, USB C, USB A, OTG, Adapter, 6A, 120W, Schnellladen, Datenübertragung if true
block wrong connector direction and keyword spam
item_specifics_agent: fill brand, product type, color, Anschluss A/B, compatibility brand/model, features, EAN, MPN, unit, material if verified
no empty important fields if safe value exists
use Nicht zutreffend only where correct
description_conversion_agent: write mobile-first description with benefits, use cases, compatibility, limitations, delivery scope
include honest note: charging/data speed depends on device, cable, charger
make buyer understand exact delivery content
category_agent: verify eBay category by title and competitor category
block wrong category before live update
price_positioning_agent: decide whether 10.99 EUR is value-pack justified
recommend price only after competitor table
duplicate_variation_policy_guard: block duplicate fixed-price listings for identical item
allow new listing only for real difference: pack size, connector direction, color, bundle, compatibility angle
record reason for every new variant
ai_search_visibility_agent: align title, photos, item specifics, description around same buyer intent
optimize for eBay Best Match, Google Shopping, AI-style product understanding
final_listing_critic_gate: block publish/update if photo, title, specifics, category, price, description or policy checks fail
require before/after snapshot and rollback note
memory_archivist_agent: save decisions, competitor findings, prompts, patch plans, final results
update CURRENT_POINTER only after verified PASS

forbidden_now: manual random save in eBay UI
new duplicate listing without variant reason
price/title/category live change without patch plan
